title: Share Parent Tracks with Nested Components
summary: Build and verify grid subgrid in field manual topic cards with aligned headings summaries and actions through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain grid subgrid from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply grid subgrid without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 04 · Read the field manual topic cards with aligned headings summaries and actions case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 4: Which claim preserves grid subgrid when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: field manual topic cards with aligned headings summaries and actions.
steps.why: Share Parent Tracks with Nested Components makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 4 in field manual topic cards with aligned headings summaries and actions.

content.text: A nested grid normally creates independent tracks. Subgrid lets a child grid use parent row or column tracks so repeated components align internal regions without copying track values. The parent must define the relevant tracks and the child must span them. A usable fallback should preserve reading and action access even when cross-card alignment is unavailable. Apply it to field manual topic cards with aligned headings summaries and actions.
